'''Dweem''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC" /> used as a base of operations for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] until abandoned because of the [[Order of the Terrible Glare/Legends|Order of the Terrible Glare]]. Around [[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]], [[Aqinos]] trained the [[Iron Knight]]s on Dweem, where he hid with them during the later [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

{{Planet-stub}}
